$meta.step: Step 2 — Design System and UX Foundation
$meta.description: Density scales and the Android density-independent pixel foundation.

density.compact.rowHeight.description: Row height in compact density. Dense Console Web tables and long operational lists on pointer devices.

density.standard.rowHeight.description: Row height in standard density. The default on every surface, and the only density permitted for primary touch controls.

density.comfortable.rowHeight.description: Row height in comfortable density. Courier and outdoor use, and any surface where the user is moving, in a hurry, or wearing gloves.

density.compact.touchRestriction.description: Compact density is permitted only on pointer-driven Console Web surfaces. It is never applied to a touch target, because its 40dp row height is below size.touch.min.
prohibitedUsage: Never applied on Customer Android, Ops Android or the Public Tracking Portal.

density.default.description: The default density on every surface unless the user or the surface explicitly selects another.

density.android.dpiRange.description: Android density buckets the layouts are specified against. All Android dimensions in this token set are expressed in density-independent pixels, so a 48dp target is physically comparable across buckets.
